steps.title: Identify the key structural signal
steps.content: The phrase “But Robinson is not the only Indigenous writer to blend traditional stories with popular literature” reveals the text's organizing structure: an example (Robinson), followed by a parallel example (Dimaline).

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the purpose
steps.content:
Choice A identifies the purpose as discussing two writers who blend traditional Indigenous stories with popular genres.

The other three choices introduce ideas not present in the text:
  • B urges avoidance
  • C makes a memorability claim
  • D compares success levels
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
